title: Story Mode Remake
description: This mod adds things from MCSM
body:
HI! This is a Remake of MCSM. 

This mod adds blocks and items from mcsm. Also the poof sound!

Credit to telltale games for the texture!

If you want it to look more like MCSM download Story Mode Style!
Link-  https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/story-mode-style

some image:

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62c4d15075c6dc50b754a06b74ffa323ff2f5c6d.png)

![Mcsm Bricks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb18b5dbe9ddafb9bdc25f248617b889cec58e53.png)

![mcsm planks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e95edf0a6836e7ffed69cad4e299bd6df5cccd4a.png)


Join my discord server for more update or sneak peaks! https://discord.gg/U3rrwGvuUp

i hope you like the mod!
Bye!
